milestones.description: Initial meeting to discuss preferences and requirements
Mood boards and initial concept sketches presented
Final design approved with minor revisions to shelving unit
All materials ordered — custom oak shelving from Sweden
Old flooring and wall finishes removed
Wall treatments and flooring installation underway
Custom and purchased furniture to be delivered and arranged
Final walkthrough, punch list, and keys handover

progressUpdates.text: Kick-off meeting completed. Emily loves the Scandinavian concept direction.
Site measurements taken. Room dimensions confirmed at 7m × 4m.
Three mood board concepts presented. Emily selected Option B — warm tones with light oak.
3D renders finalized. Minor revision requested for shelving placement.
Design formally approved. Procurement phase begins.
Oak flooring sample approved. Order placed with 4-week lead time.
All material orders confirmed. Custom shelving ETA: Jan 25.
Demolition started. Old vinyl flooring removed. Walls prepped for painting.
Electrical rewiring for new pendant lighting completed.
Oak flooring installation begins. Expected completion: Feb 15.
Flooring done! Walls painted in Eggshell White. Looking beautiful.
Feature wall with oak slat paneling installed. Stunning result.

milestones.description: Client brief received — calming retreat with natural elements
Japandi concept with bamboo and linen textures presented
Design approved on first presentation — client thrilled
Bamboo panels and clay plaster sourced from Japan
Room cleared and prepped for new wall finishes
Clay feature wall completed. Platform bed base built.
All furniture and soft furnishings installed
Project handed over — client delighted with the result

progressUpdates.text: Met with Kevin. He wants a calming bedroom retreat with Japanese influences.
Presented Japandi concept — bamboo, linen, muted earth tones. Kevin loved it.
Design approved! Starting material sourcing.
Premium bamboo panels and organic cotton bedding ordered.
Room cleared. Old carpet removed, subfloor leveled.
Clay plaster feature wall completed — beautiful natural texture.
Platform bed frame built with integrated storage.
Bamboo panel accent wall installed behind bed.
All furniture in place. Paper lantern pendants hung.
Styling complete. Added ceramic vases and eucalyptus.
Final handover — Kevin is thrilled. Project completed under budget!
